name: Priya Sharma
text: Rohit delivered our e-commerce platform ahead of schedule with exceptional quality. His attention to detail and proactive communication made the project a huge success. Highly recommend!

name: Alex Chen
text: Working with Rohit was a pleasure. He understood our complex requirements quickly and implemented elegant solutions. The codebase is clean, well-documented, and maintainable.

name: Sarah Johnson
text: Rohit's React skills are top-notch. He built our design system from scratch, creating reusable components that our entire team now relies on. Great communicator and team player.
